text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Narita Brian topples the Emperor and claims the
Japan Cup. In that moment, a new legend is
born...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Watching from the stands, Mayano Top Gun is
moved by Narita Brian's performance and is filled
with a desire to race her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Having surpassed her personal summit, Narita
Brian shows no signs of slowing down as she
eagerly anticipates her next race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Though many call her the Emperor's successor,
she can only follow her own road. And next stop
on that road is the Arima Kinen, the final race of
the Senior Autumn Triple Crown!
